summary:
FINANCIAL FAITH AND WEALTH TRANSFER VISIONS: Brandon shares a prophetic directive for believers to expect profound financial overflow, debt cancellation, and generational wealth as 2025 concludes and 2026 begins. While attending a church prayer meeting, Brandon experienced a vision of four pitch-black doors standing upon a holy, white chalky rock. As he prayed, the middle door opened to reveal an avalanche of gold coins, followed by another door releasing silver. Brandon associates this vision with a biblically based end-time wealth transfer, referencing teachings by Billye Brim, and emphasizes the need to actively contend for these hidden resources. He also describes seeing a blacked-out electric pole with black cords powering the doors, accompanied by a divine instruction to flip the switch through intercession.

SPIRITUAL AUTHORITY AND POLITICAL ENGAGEMENT: Brandon urges believers to actively use their spiritual authority against demonic forces rather than hiding in fear. He underscores the necessity of vocalizing faith and maintaining a strong, positive confession, noting that words carry the power of life and death. Brandon firmly advocates for Christian involvement in politics, urging his audience to vote for righteous candidates who oppose abortion and homosexuality. Comparing himself to a spiritual Paul Revere, Brandon issues a stark warning about the reality of hell and the imperative of repentance, stressing that the church must act as a restraining force against evil in the United States.

END TIME SHAKINGS AND GLOBAL EVENTS: Brandon recounts divine warnings regarding five major impending shakings in politics, finances, the earths crust, the heavens, and the church. Highlighting recent earthquakes in the Philippines and Afghanistan, he cautions against becoming desensitized to the signs of the times. Brandon points to a specific timeframe beginning September 23rd as a period of significant acceleration and remembrance, while also prophesying a massive upcoming revival on college campuses and within the church. Furthermore, he mentions seeing a returning plague and widespread death, emphasizing the urgency of these end-time labor pains.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon discusses national security concerns, referencing a Homeland Security hit list circulated by Donald Trump. He details intelligence regarding Mexican cartels and MS-13 offering substantial financial bounties for the targeting, kidnapping, and assassination of ICE and CBP officers. Brandon also notes the averting of terrorist attacks in Michigan, calling for intense prayer to dismantle these adversarial assignments against American law enforcement.

SUPERNATURAL HEALING PROCLAMATIONS: Brandon addresses various physical ailments, specifically declaring the healing of migraine headaches and severe reproductive system issues. He speaks directly to conditions such as cysts, scarring, fallopian tube blockages, heavy menstrual cycles, and mastitis. Brandon proclaims fertility breakthroughs, the prevention of miscarriages, and the promise of full-term pregnancies, even mentioning the possibility of twins and abundant milk production for nursing mothers.

EUROPEAN SUMMONING AND OLYMPIC CEREMONY VISIONS: Brandon shares a detailed vision concerning Europe, specifically focusing on underground caverns in Berlin where he perceives the summoning of an Antichrist and Hitler-like spirit. He connects these dark spiritual practices to the upcoming Winter Olympics scheduled for February 2026, predicting that the opening ceremonies in Germany and France will contain occultic elements. Brandon issues warnings about Italy, the Vatican, and a figure he identifies as Pope Leo, alongside visions of a volcano, deadly silent gases, and a sacrificial arrowhead made of volcanic rock. He suggests these European events are designed to trigger a world war involving the Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse and the Mahdi, with demonic entities on high alert in castles across Romania and the Kremlin in Russia.

APOLLYON AND THE NEW YORK CITY WARNING: Brandon describes seeing the demonic entity Apollyon circling Vladimir Putin before coming to an abrupt halt, frozen and staring at a divine light, signifying that all demonic forces recognize the impending return of Jesus Christ. Shifting focus to the United States, Brandon reveals a vision of a hot, fiery explosion originating from a building in Times Square, New York City. He describes this event as a sudden flash of light tied to a device, prompting him to call for preemptive prayers for Homeland Security and the FBI to uncover and stop this mass casualty terrorist plot before a New Year's Eve celebration.
rawData: [November 03, 2025]-[Praying over 4 major doors]-[https://youtu.be/SDUTBdo_u6k]-[Well, good morning, family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again today. It's not morning, but almost. It's pretty late at night, but I just wanted to come on and pray with you all a little bit tonight before you all go to bed, praying over your week that you will have a victorious week, that this week will be a week of breakthrough for your household, and that we're closing out 2025 not broke, busted, and disgusted, but believing God for the overflow. You know, I told you all, make that list and stretch your faith. You need spiritual stretch marks. I've talked about it how many times now—that you are believing God so big, but you're so pregnant spiritually that you have spiritual stretch marks. It's time to believe God for the exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. That's where I said, "Let's finish 2025 with the overflow." When the Lord is showing us in the vision to believe for your house to be paid off, believe for your student loans, believe for your car note to be paid off, and to be debt-free. We have about eight weeks left of this year, and it's nothing for God. I just know He can turn it on a dime, and there's a million and one ways that He can get you a million dollars. I just believe it. And you say, "Well, Brandon, why are you saying all that?" Because He's been stretching me to believe Him for bigger and to have spiritual stretch marks. If you don't have spiritual stretch marks, you're not believing big enough because you're not pregnant enough with what God has called you to do. You're not stretching out there knowing that God is able to do it. If you're just barely believing, that's where you're going to be; you're just going to barely get by and barely hit the status quo. But if you're believing for big, I would rather believe for huge and get half of it than believe for small and get nothing. Believe for an overflow so big that you go, "Man, I'm not only believing for my house to be paid off, but I'm going to pay off my pastor's house." Why not believe big? I've got so much overflow to have my stuff paid off that I've got enough to pay off three other people's stuff. I'm a lender unto many, and I shall not borrow. Why not believe for big? So, I set out to believe for big things for the rest of the year going into 2026. What are you believing God for in 2026? I'm believing for my kids to be saved, I'm believing for my wife to be saved, and I'm believing for my husband to be saved. I want to walk in the supernatural. Why not? Why not you? Why not me? There's an expiration date to your problems. That's where I was at today. Guys, I was blowing the leaves off in my yard and cleaning up my yard today because the leaves are falling so heavily now. It's starting to rain leaves here in Tulsa, and the leaves are saying hello. I told Diana I don't like this part of the year whenever these leaves are doing all that, but it's a blessing, and we're so thankful for the trees. I just want to say that to you all just to stretch yourself to believe. When I was outside and I was doing the yard work, prayer tonight was at the church, and Pastor Candace and them always have prayer. I was like, "Man, I want to finish these leaves." Then the Lord said, "Brandon, I want you to go to prayer and add your supply. I want you to take your family, and I want you to add your supply. There's things that I'll show you in reward if you go. I want you to add your supply." So I said, "Okay, Father. I'll do it." I love prayer anyway; it's not like you have to twist my arm to go pray. But when you're busy and you're wanting to finish the job and there's a pile of leaves that you've blown, I thought, "Well, if the wind gets them, they get them." But I put them in the pile and I told Diana, "Let's go, babe." So we were a little late, but we went in. I started praying, and the lady that was leading the prayer tonight was praying over families, for the Thanksgiving season, and for strife not to be in the homes—basically stuff like that. She said her prayer assignment today was praying over finances and stuff. I believe there's an anointing for that—to pray for certain things that God calls your vein of what you're to pray for. He shows me a lot about the economy privately that I don't talk about—about the housing market, about gold, about everything—and I just intercede for this. So I just started adding my supply, and all of a sudden I was taken in the spirit and saw what the spirit of God was showing me. I saw four major, huge doors. They were built on a rock, but it wasn't a normal rock. It looked like a white, chalky rock, but it was holy. All these doors were built on this rock. I could see each individual one was completely black. Take your screen on your cell phone when it's turned off—that blackness. It looks like that; it's piercing, it swallows you, and you get lost in it. These doors were so black that you couldn't make out the door handles, but I knew they were separate and individually done. The Lord had me praying over these doors, and all of a sudden the middle door opened up, and in this door were golden coins. Megan's laughing about those golden coins; she gets excited; she's in the living room. She's fine. The golden coins were on a hill, and as the door opened up, they started falling through the door like an avalanche. These were all stacked up really high, and as the door opened, it was so full of golden coins that they started coming out because the pressure was on the door. I was looking at that door, and the Lord said to pray, because it was so dark that the outside of it was hidden. You had to pray into it; you had to contend for it. Like I keep telling y'all, we have to contend for the blessing. You cannot just idly sit by and expect to walk in the abundance for these last days. We know that Satan's wheelhouse, his specialty, is over finances. So we are going and plundering the demonic realm and saying, "Listen, we're taking back what you stole from us. We're taking back everything the devil has stolen from us, and we're demanding the thief pay us double for our trouble." I'm calling for double for my trouble—everything that you have been stealing from me for how many years. Then the Lord said, "Call for your ancestors' finances." We were praying into this. I haven't even brought this up yet. But the Lord said to us, "Call for your ancestors' seeds, too. If your family generation worked hard, sowed, and were givers at their church but they never reaped it, he said, 'Call for their seeds, too. If they never reaped it, those seeds do not die.'" Seeds do not die. He said, "They lie dormant sometimes in the ground or, if they're in a dark place, they won't grow until the light hits them or unless water hits them. You can put seed in there." He said, "Speak to those old seeds to reap a harvest, Brandon. For there's generational wealth that is coming for the body of Christ if you lay hold to it, for this last outpouring of finances, for an end-time harvest transfer." Sister Billye said, "I didn't know if it was biblical or not." She said that because you always want to know if you're off. If it's not in the Word, you cannot go against what the Word says. So Sister Billye Brim, who wrote this book we were talking about yesterday that Diana read—she's an elder and I always respect my elders. She started researching all the biblical basis for an end-time wealth transfer and she says it's in the Word. She found it all. She goes through the Greek; she's brilliant when it comes to this stuff. I love it when you can talk to her and have a really cool conversation about the Word; she's full of the Word. The end-time wealth transfer is there. As I was praying into this—and maybe we'll have her on one day and she can talk about it because you want to know where that's at in the Word—I'm not educated enough to tell you. I'm humble enough to tell you that I don't know, but I trust her and I'll allow her to come on and show you in the Word where it's at because I thought it was awesome. She had it all in there. Going back to the doors: I saw these four doors and as I was praying, the Lord said, "These are end-time. This is what's hidden. It's in the darkness. You have to pray and contend for it and bring it out into the light." As you are praying, I saw the gold door open and all this coin, and then I saw silver open and the silver started to fall out. I said, "What are the other two doors?" I don't know yet. But as I was praying, the Lord was showing me—and this is not financial advice, I'm not telling you to buy silver or gold—I'm telling you what I saw behind the door and what I'm praying over. You pray too and ask God what He's telling you because I'm still trying to ask God what this is all about. As I was praying, I saw these doors open. Then I saw two doors over here and they represented something. But as I was praying, I could see these four electric lines on an electric pole. What was interesting was the electric pole was blacked out so much that you could not really make out that it was an electric pole. The electric lines were like lines you see on the earth running to—I was trying to show them like a black extension cord—but they were like a black cord. It's all right, son. It's a black cord that was running and powering each door. And the Lord said, "Flip the switch. Flip the switch." I started interceding for this. When I started seeing this black cord—thanks, Braden. Black headphones. You can have them back, buddy. Thank you. As I was praying, the Lord said, "Pray into this." I get these assignments and I'm like a boy. The lady up at the front is leading and going a totally different direction, but I'm in the back with my heels ground down in the ground. I'm like, "No, hold on. We have to park here because I want to see more." I'm not leading, so I'm just trying to remember this. She's taking notes and remembering everything the Lord is showing me because they were praying for families and stuff. But I was on my own little hound trail—you know, like a bloodhound. Their noses are to the ground and they're going to find out what this is in the spirit realm. That's just the way I am because I am determined to have everything that God has for me. I am determined to make sure I don't lack any good thing for my family. We are going to be on that side of the blessing, that side of exceedingly abundantly. We have what it takes to do it. We're contenders. The Lord told me on the way home, I told her, I said, "Do we do a live stream tonight?" because it was late already. I said, "You know, there are certain things I could have done, but let's pray some more about these doors. Let's go ahead and do a live stream." I fed the kids and said, "Let's go and do the live stream." As I was praying into this and Braden was getting this set up, the Lord said to me, "Brandon, I am assembling together the closers even more. You prayer intercessors who come on here are not just average prayer people. He saved the best for last. You're the closers. You're the generation, I believe with all my heart, that will not taste death. We will be that generation that sees the Lord Jesus Christ come back for His church. But He brought us here for such a time as this, not just to sit by idly and watch the end-time unfold around us, but to pray into it and to have an assignment for angelic aid and assistance. We're not just sitting back idly and going, "Well, God, whatever will be will be, Que sera, sera." No. The sky is not falling. Things are not coming apart. We have authority. That's why we brought this to you. You must use your authority in these last days. If you're not, you're missing it. People say, "Brandon, you need to be careful with that. The devil's going to hear you. You don't want to provoke a principality." I'm not out there sticking my finger in a principality's eye, but as for me and my house, we have authority over the devil. He isn't going to mess with us. You either take it or he's going to run you over. The roaring lion seeks whom he may devour. He isn't devouring us. We're going to stand and plead the blood of Jesus. We're going to stand and anoint our heads with oil and say, "Hey, our cup runneth over." Surely goodness and mercy are going to follow us all the days of our life. I'm not going to sit there and go, "Well, we better hide from the devil because he's out there coming to try to devour you." I hate to burst your bubble, but he's going to try to devour the ones who are hiding more than the ones who have a sword out saying, "You come over here and I'm going to slap you in the head with this." Do you think he doesn't see that? He's attracted to fear. When I had demonic stuff going on, the devils know when you're afraid. Just like bees and dogs smell fear, the devil knows when you're afraid versus if you know who you are in Christ and you have authority over him. You must exercise your authority. And that's why we brought this to you. Some people got all bent out. You were trying to take over your area, over your household, over your family, over your church, over your schools, praying over the weather. As he is, so are we in this world. And if Jesus could do it, he gave us the authority to do it also. He didn't sit there and go, 'I get annoyed with this. I get annoyed with this spineless not having a backbone like a crowbar. If we don't contend and stand for what we believe in, we'll lose it.' I'm telling you, the body of Christ is the salt of this earth. And we are to do what it takes. We're the ones, the great restrainers. I believe the Holy Spirit does. Christ in us, the hope of glory. Christ in you. We're the restrainers from the evil. We have authority to bind and loose and do the things that need to be done to get the job done for this end-time harvest, for the finances, for whatever it takes. And the only reason the United States is the way it is, is because the church sits idly by with their head in the sand and saying, 'Well, whatever will be, will be.' Well, we don't need to get in politics, brother; you need to stay out of that. No, I'm going to get in politics. I'm going to vote for righteous men and women to get in office that will stand for what we stand for: against abortion, against homosexuality, against these things. You know why? Because all those things are sin. And it leads you to death. It leads you to hell. And somebody needs to tell you the truth. If nobody's out there telling you the truth, you get on the other side and say, 'Hey, they didn't warn me.' Guess what? Your blood's on my hands. But if I warn you and you still go to hell, that's on you. But at least I told you you're going to hell and you need to repent and turn back from your wicked ways so that you can change and you can have an opportunity to make a choice. It's our job to tell you the truth. The Bible is alive and I'm telling you it's never changed. What God stood for back then is what he stands for now. Just because we have a limp-wristed gospel and a lot of people that don't want to tell you the truth that Jesus Christ is coming—and he's coming back for a glorious church without spot or wrinkle—doesn't mean that it's not going to happen because they're not telling you. But if you come here, I'm the watchman on the wall warning you and yelling at the top of my lungs, telling you that Jesus Christ is coming and you need to repent. You need to repent and turn from your wicked ways because if you don't, you're going to burn in hell forever. Is that bad? No, it's me telling you the truth and you don't want to hear it. They get mad. 'Well, we're turning you off.' Well, bye. Bye. At least I warned you. You heard it right before you turned me off. 'I don't want to hear that, brother. You're too radical.' I'm trying to tell you that Jesus Christ is coming. That is radical. Just like Paul Revere yells in the midnight hour, running and telling all the minutemen saying, 'Hey, the British are coming! The British are coming!' I'm the Paul Revere of this generation, riding in the midnight hour, telling you that Jesus is coming. You need to get your house ready. You need to get your boat ready because as in the days of Noah, so will it be when the Son of Man returns. And I'm telling you, look around you, folks. Look around you. Wars and rumors of wars, plagues and pestilences, earthquakes in divers places. We had one in the Philippines today. We had one in Afghanistan today. In divers places, we're having these earthquakes. And many people are so desensitized to all of it because we hear about it all the time that you think it's just the status quo. And as a frog in a pot, as the water keeps getting hotter and hotter and you don't even realize that you're getting boiled alive, you must realize where we are and the signs of the times and the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. It's time to fall on our face before a holy God and say, 'God, have mercy on this generation.' We need a harvest of souls like we've never seen before. We need a revival. We think, 'Well, Charlie Kirk went home and we have a couple of months,' and like I told you, you all go back into your lackadaisical ways—'Well, you know, the holidays are coming, so we're focused on that'—until we have another major event and it shakes you a little bit and you go, 'Well, that shouldn't have happened.' Brother Hagin said anything that happens in this earth that is bad is a church prayer failure. It's a church prayer failure. And that's why the Lord told me, he said, 'Brandon, it's going to take much prayer in these last days. So raise up a million men and women prayer army. Come on the internet and pray with my people. Teach them to pray. Teach them to have fellowship with me and tell them that I'm coming.' I said, 'Lord, they know you're coming.' Most of the church knows. Well, the ones I hang around, at least we all talk about it all the time. He looked me straight in the eyes and he said, 'Brandon, they don't know. They don't know. There's no urgency. There's no urgency in my church. For I'm going to create an urgency for one last call. I'm going to shake this generation one more time. And I'm going to bring them to their knees for fearful sights they will see that will bring them to their knees.' And there will be five major shakings throughout this earth: a shaking in politics, a shaking in finances, a shaking in the earth's crust and earthquakes, a shaking in the heavens, and a shaking in the church. Five major shakings. You're going to see, and we're seeing some of it right now, but as I'm telling you, as labor pains upon a woman, so will it be. I'm telling you, we're going to see. He even told us even the day, he said, 'Watch from the 23rd of September, for September will be a month to remember.' And Charlie Kirk went home. September will be a month to remember. Nobody will forget it. And I'll never forget what happened with Charlie Kirk. Never. But I saw major revival coming to college campuses. I saw a major revival coming throughout this earth. I saw brush arbor churches. I saw churches that were on fire. I saw the pastors preaching repentance. But then he said, 'Be patient with my babies for they're coming. They're coming in hot, Braden.' And so I just keep trying to tell you and sounding the alarm over and over. And you say, 'Well, Braden, I've already heard this,' but you need to hear it again. You need to hear it again. You need to have that fan flamed to warn you that Jesus is coming. And I'll keep doing this. Just like Jeremiah kept warning the people that stuff was coming and they kept saying, 'Oh, we heard that.' How many times did you read him saying the same thing over and over and over again to the point it seemed redundant? But he said it to the point where it happened. And I'm telling you, life and death is in the power of your tongue. And I'm telling you, you need to watch what you say. I told D, I said, 'We've got to come up higher in our confession. We've got to come up higher in what we're saying because life and death is in the power of the tongue. But as a man thinketh in his heart, so is he. But as you think, what you speak, out of the abundance of the heart, the mouth speaks. And what you're saying is what you're living today. What you said yesterday is what you're going to live. What you said today is what you live tomorrow or the next day. But what you keep saying out of your mouth because your tongue... the Bible says the tongue is the pen of a ready writer. I believe your tongue is the pen of a ready writer. You're writing your ticket. You're writing what you're living.' What are you saying out of your mouth? What are you believing? 'My marriage is terrible. My kids are all rebellious.' You have what you say. 'Well, we're poor. We'll always be poor. Grandma was poor. Her great-grandma was poor. You know what? We're always just going to be some backwoods people that just kind of live off the land.' No, I'm more than a conqueror. I have more than enough. My bank account is in overflow. I'm just going to say that I'm not moved by what I see. I'm not moved by what I feel. Even when you click the bank account and you look at it, I'm not moved by you. I speak to you to change. It may say you're in the negative. You're looking at it and saying, 'I don't care what you say. I believe that my God is an abundant supply. He supplies all my needs.' The doctor comes and gives you a bad report. The doctor says you have four weeks to live. I speak to this report. I refuse to believe this. Even if you go down fighting, at least you stood for something good. Whether you are absent from the body and present with the Lord, either way you win, but at least you believe God for it all the way. Whose report will you believe? We shall believe the report of the Lord. I believe you're going to have to believe in this day and in the days ahead. You're going to have to contend. I'm telling you this because I see a storm coming. People don't want to hear it. 'Well, you know, you're looking into the tribulation, brother.' No, I'm seeing labor pains. I'm seeing storms. I'm seeing a plague again. I saw it again today. I have a glimpse into it. The Lord shows me and I am praying. I see the plague and I'm looking at people dying. Today I'm outside blowing my leaves off and I see it and I go, 'What am I supposed to do with that?' He warns, He has me praying, and I intercede a lot. I don't let things bother me. I see things about the housing market; I see about these things. What I warned you about is right here in the news. I remember what I told you about the hit list. Here is President Trump right here. Can you put it on there? I can't read the font because it's way too small. But that's okay. Let me see. Read the hit list. He just retweeted what Homeland Security put. It's on Donald Trump's Truth Social. He posted what Homeland Security put, and it says criminal organizations in Mexico have begun offering thousands of dollars for the murder of federal law enforcement with payouts escalating based on rank and action taken: $2,000 for gathering intelligence or doxing agents, including photos and family details; $5,000 to $10,000 for kidnapping or non-lethal assaults on standard ICE and CBP officers; and up to $50,000 for the assassination of high-ranking officials. It says that our ICE officers are facing more than a 1,000% increase in assaults against them. Under President Trump and the Secretary, every criminal, terrorist, and illegal alien will face American justice. This is the list I saw. When you see in part, you hear in part, and I tell you it's funded by another government. It's funded by cartels. I saw MS-13, and there's a lot of things I can't even say about what I've seen, but I'm trying to tell you that you need to be serious about the signs of the times. We see terrorist attacks being averted in Michigan. We see the darkness, but we have authority. We're praying and we're bringing down this assignment from the enemy. I'm telling you folks, many hands make light work. I've said enough; it's been 30 minutes. I tried to keep it under 30 minutes tonight because I told Diana, 'I'm talking way too long.' I just wanted to try to stir you up a little bit before we pray that you have authority, and that's why we do this. We're going to pray, and if the Lord shows me more about these doors, great. If He doesn't, He'll show me some other time. But I know that we are in a time of something supernatural about to take place for the Body of Christ as we enter into this month of November. I believe it's going to be a time of great acceleration for us—not sitting back and saying, 'What a missed opportunity.' Believe God big today. So, let's pray. Take communion with us. Father, we thank You for the Body. We're so grateful for all that You've done and everything that You said in Your Word: that we have what we say and we're more than conquerors. Father, I thank You, Lord, that we have the Greater One living on the inside of us. We are wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. From the top of my head to the soles of my feet, the Holy Spirit dwells within me. I am in overflow with the Holy Spirit. I thank You, Father, that You dwell on the inside of me, my wife, and my children. We receive it richly by faith—that we will lack no good thing, that we will lack no good gift. We will walk in the abundance of the Holy Ghost and fire in our household. Father, I thank You for Your body that was broken. You were beaten. You took it all on the cross. They whipped You with that cat-o'-nine-tails, Father. They really did a number on You. Father, You took it all for me. You did it because You love me, Lord. But You didn't just do it for me; You did it for every person that's watching this right now and anybody else who would receive it. You did it for us. You became sin, You became sickness, You became poor, You became mentally disturbed. He took it all. He took that crown of thorns on His head. It says in His Word in 2 Timothy 1:7 that God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power and of love and of a sound mind. Because of what You did on that cross for us, we have a sound mind, because He became all that for us. So, Father, I thank You that we don't have to take it because in Galatians, Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law. Because You took it on the cross, Father, we're redeemed from the curse. I'm not under the curse. Jesus has set me free. For sickness, I have health; for poverty, wealth; for Christ has ransomed me. We believe everything that You did for us, and we receive it in Jesus' name. Thank You, Lord. Thank You, Father, for all that You provided for us. Amen and amen. Take it; we don't have to be sick. I receive it, Father. We make much of the blood because the blood makes much of us. We apply the blood of Jesus. We thank You, Lord, that no weapon formed against us is going to prosper. Every tongue that rises against us, we condemn it. We plead the blood of Jesus over us. We thank You, Lord, for the angels that are watching over us. If there's anything You want to show me or show her, Father, I thank You that we're willing and able to hear You, God. A stranger's voice we will not follow. Father, we thank You that we don't add to any prophetic confusion in the airwaves; we only hear You, Father, and we only see what You want us to see. We plead the blood over us in Jesus' name. Thank You, Lord. See, every time is different. It's just out of the flow. You want some of this? I usually don't drink this because it makes you burp. So, Father, here we go. Who wants to go tubing? Braden, you're so funny every time, baby. We're going to go tubing. We'll go down that Holy Ghost river. Let's pray together and see what the Lord has for us tonight. I feel there's something.
